creator: wollman@csail.mit.edu
text:
In the month of November, MIT released two security advisories for
the MIT Kerberos implementation.  These address vulnerabilities
CVE-2010-1324, CVE-2010-1323, CVE-2010-4020, CVE-2010-4021, and
CVE-2010-1322.

How-To-Repeat: 	Visit http://web.mit.edu/kerberos/advisories/.
